item.title: Issue #2489 created
item.description:
fn:parts-of-dateTime, fn:parse-uri: names & types

@michaelhkay I guess you thought about this one:

I could be clearer if we renamed fn:parts-of-dateTime to fn:parse-dateTime. From a technical point of view, the difference is certainly that dateTime items have already been parsed. From a user perspective, I assume it is nontrivial to understand the difference between analyzing/parsing xs:date('2001-01-01) and xs:anyURI('http://url.com') items.

As an alternative, we could also rename fn:parse-uri to fn:parts-of-uri. In addition, we should either rename dateTime-record to dateTime-structure-record or uri-structure-record to uri-record.
